message:
feat(fp-io): add read_csv thousands separator parity (frankenpandas-xo9e)

Adds CsvReadOptions.thousands: Option<u8> matching
pd.read_csv(thousands=...). Strips the thousands byte from each field
before numeric parsing so strings like "1,234,567" parse as Int64 and
European-style "1.234,56" (with decimal=b',') parses as Float64. When
thousands equals decimal the option is silently ignored, matching
pandas. Non-numeric fields are left untouched.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
